title: Xtremeauto 5pc Paint Brush Set – Synthetic Bristle Brushes for Emulsion, Gloss, Varnish & Stains – Ergonomic Handles – Sizes: 0.5”, 1”, 1.5”, 2”, 2.5” – Ideal for DIY & Craft Projects (5 Piece)
features: 5 Versatile Sizes – Includes 0.5”, 1”, 1.5”, 2” & 2.5” brushes for every task, from precision detail to wide surface coverage. Perfect for trim, skirting boards, walls, and furniture.
Smooth & Even Coverage – High-quality synthetic bristles provide excellent paint pickup and release, delivering a streak-free, professional finish with minimal effort.
All-Paint Compatibility – Use with all paint types: emulsion, gloss, varnish, water-based, stains, and more—ideal for DIYers, decorators, and hobbyists.
Comfortable Control – Ergonomic handles offer a secure grip for steady brush strokes, reducing hand fatigue on long projects or fine detailing.
Durable & Reusable – Rust-resistant ferrules keep bristles secure. Easy to clean and built to last—ideal for repeat use on indoor and outdoor projects.
description: Product Description The Xtremeauto 5PC Paint Brush Set The Xtremeauto 5PC Paint Brush Set is a versatile, high-quality collection designed to deliver smooth, professional results on every project — whether you’re painting walls, trim, furniture, or doing detailed craft work. Compatible with All Paint Types: Ideal for use with emulsion, gloss, varnish, stains, and water-based paints , making this set suitable for both DIY projects and professional decorating . Smooth & Even Finish: Crafted with premium synthetic bristles , each brush provides excellent paint pickup and release for streak-free, consistent coverage with minimal effort. Ergonomic & Comfortable Grip: Each brush features a lightweight, ergonomically designed handle that ensures comfort and control, reducing fatigue during extended use. Complete 5-Piece Set: Includes 0.5”, 1”, 1.5”, 2”, and 2.5” brushes , giving you the perfect tool for everything from fine detailing to larger surface coverage. Durable & Easy to Clean: Built with rust-resistant metal ferrules to keep bristles firmly in place. The brushes are easy to wash and reuse , ensuring long-lasting performance for both indoor and outdoor projects. Whether you’re a professional decorator, home renovator, or creative hobbyist , the Xtremeauto Paint Brush Set provides the precision, comfort, and durability needed to achieve a flawless finish every time.
